description: Compare the proportion of high scores (>3) between variables N1 and N2 from /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/NeuroticiIndex.csv using a McNemar's test. Create two nominal computed variables, 'N1_Binary' (Formula: IF(N1 > 3, 1, 0)) and 'N2_Binary' (Formula: IF(N2 > 3, 1, 0)), for the analysis. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/NeuroticismMcNemar.omv and record the resulting p-value in the format 'p_value: [value]' to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/mcnemar_results.txt.
